jsonLd.title: NHB is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at NHB are looking for an experienced Credit Analyst based out of Coimbatore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About NHB:
NHB is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHB!
